scheme_name: PM SHRI Schools (PM Schools for Rising India)
short_description: Upgradation of 14,500 schools as exemplar schools with modern infrastructure and quality education.
detailed_description: PM SHRI Schools scheme aims to develop more than 14,500 PM SHRI Schools across the country. These schools will be developed as exemplar schools and will also act as mentors to other schools in their vicinity. These schools will aim to be green schools, with water conservation, waste recycling, and energy-efficient infrastructure. They will have modern infrastructure, including labs, smart classrooms, libraries, sports, art rooms, and will offer holistic and well-rounded education as envisaged in the National Education Policy 2020.
key_benefits: Green school initiatives (solar panels, rainwater harvesting)
Free quality education for all enrolled students
other_conditions: Student must be enrolled in a designated PM SHRI school
Schools are selected through a challenge mode from existing government schools
Schools will serve as model institutions for neighboring schools

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: Proof of enrollment in PM SHRI designated school
Transfer certificate and mark sheets for admission

application_steps_offline: Check if your local government school is designated as PM SHRI school
Visit the school during admission period
Fill the admission form as per school requirements
Submit required documents to school office
Complete admission formalities as per school norms

submission_locations.address: Designated PM SHRI Schools across India
submission_locations.notes: Check PM SHRI portal for list of designated schools in your area

faq.question: How can I find PM SHRI schools near me?
faq.answer: Visit the official PM SHRI portal at pmshrischools.education.gov.in to find the list of designated schools in your district.

faq.question: Is there any fee for studying in PM SHRI schools?
faq.answer: PM SHRI schools are government schools, so education is free as per existing government school norms.

faq.question: What makes PM SHRI schools different?
faq.answer: These schools have upgraded infrastructure, smart classrooms, modern labs, sports facilities, and implement NEP 2020 holistic education approach.

common_rejection_reasons: School not designated as PM SHRI school
Age criteria not met for specific class
tips_for_successful_application: Apply during the official admission period
Verify if your nearby school is PM SHRI designated
Keep all documents ready before visiting school
Contact school office for specific admission requirements
